frames: The agent is in a low, stable posture with all four legs spread wide on the ground.
It slightly lowers its body, lifting and extending its front right leg before placing it back down.
The agent's body lowers further, and its front left leg lifts and extends forward, then returns to the ground.
The agent's body is very low, almost touching the ground, with all legs still spread wide.
It begins to lift its body, primarily pushing up with its back legs, while the front legs remain low.
The agent's body is now significantly elevated, with its front legs bent upwards, and it appears to be losing balance.
It falls onto its back, with all four legs flailing upwards and outwards in an uncontrolled motion.
The agent remains on its back, twitching its legs, unable to regain an upright position.
